title: Retrieval ranks by graph priors: liveness × provenance × recency + topic-chain successor promotion — measured lift, no model
context: Shipped from the roadmap with the eval gate it demanded. Baseline on the new committed golden set (bench/golden-retrieval.json, 10 real cases): Recall@10 90%, MRR 0.693, one dead miss — a query that lexically matched only a SUPERSEDED decision while the live successor never entered the candidate pool.
decision: Post-fusion rerank in hybridSearch + searchScoped (rerankByPriors): rank-based blend — 1/(60+i) × liveness(0.6 if superseded/retired/rejected) × provenance(1.0 human_confirmed / 0.85 llm_draft / 0.75 extracted-inferred) × recency(0.7 + 0.3·½^(age/90d)) — so bm25's negative scale never leaks and priors are BOUNDED: old or superseded records dim, never disappear. Runbook trigger phrases matching the query boost ×1.5 in scoped retrieval. TOPIC-CHAIN PROMOTION: a superseded decision in the pool injects its topic's CURRENT decision at the predecessor's rank (×0.98) — the reader asked about the topic; the graph's one live answer must surface even when only history matches lexically; fires even on a single-hit pool (the common lone-stale-match case). Measured after: Recall@10 100%, MRR 0.787 (+13.6% rel), hit-rate 100%; full suite green incl. graphrank regressions (ties keep fused order — stable sort).
consequences: bench/golden-retrieval.json is committed — `hunch eval --file bench/golden-retrieval.json` is now a regression gate for any future retrieval change
rerank reads recs() per hit (cached loadAll) — bounded by pool size (≤50)
raw store.search() stays a pure FTS primitive (context-fallback and internal feeders untouched); priors apply at the retrieval surfaces: hybridSearch, searchScoped, searchRunbooks
alternatives_rejected: Score-space blending with bm25 values: bm25 is negative and corpus-dependent — rank-space (RRF-style) composes cleanly with the existing fusion
Unbounded recency/provenance weights: canonical old decisions must stay findable; floors (0.7 recency, 0.6 liveness) keep history one notch down, not gone
Swapping the superseded hit for its successor: history is a legitimate answer — promotion ADDS the current truth above it, never erases the trail
LLM reranking: no model in the retrieval path — same doctrine as the guards
